query_es: ¿Cómo arreglamos el bug de expiración de tokens JWT?
memory_en: Fixed JWT auth bug: the token expiry check compared UTC to local time, causing false 'expired' errors for users in GMT-3.

query_es: ¿Por qué falla el pipeline de CI en macOS?
memory_en: CI failures on macOS runners traced to a stale Homebrew cache; pinned the actions/cache key to include the Xcode version.

query_es: ¿Cómo evitamos que la migración de base de datos bloquee la tabla en producción?
memory_en: Adopted online schema migrations with pt-online-schema-change to avoid long table locks on the orders table during deploys.

query_es: ¿Cuál es nuestra estrategia de testing end-to-end?
memory_en: Decided to keep E2E tests thin and fast: cover only the critical checkout flow, push everything else down to unit and integration tests.

query_es: ¿Cómo invalidamos la caché cuando cambia el precio de un producto?
memory_en: Cache invalidation for product pricing now publishes a Redis pub/sub event on price change, consumed by every API replica to evict the local LRU entry.

query_es: ¿Por qué migramos a logs estructurados?
memory_en: Switched all services to structured JSON logging with slog so the log aggregator can index request_id and trace fields without regex parsing.

query_es: ¿Cómo funciona nuestro despliegue blue-green?
memory_en: Blue-green deployment routes traffic via the load balancer target group swap; the old version stays warm for 10 minutes as an instant rollback path.

query_es: ¿Cuál es la convención del equipo para hacer rebase antes de mergear?
memory_en: Team convention: always rebase feature branches onto main before opening a PR, never merge main back into the feature branch.

query_es: ¿Qué chequeamos en el checklist de code review?
memory_en: Code review checklist covers test coverage, error handling on the unhappy path, and whether the PR touches any documented API contract.

query_es: ¿Cómo solucionamos el problema de N+1 queries en el listado de usuarios?
memory_en: Fixed the N+1 query in the user list endpoint by eager-loading the profile relation with a single JOIN instead of one query per row.

query_es: ¿Cada cuánto rotamos las credenciales de la base de datos?
memory_en: Database credentials rotate automatically every 90 days via the secrets manager; app pods pick up the new value on next restart without downtime.

query_es: ¿Por qué elegimos Zustand en vez de Redux para el estado global?
memory_en: Picked Zustand over Redux for global state: less boilerplate, no reducers/actions ceremony, and it plays well with React Server Components.

query_es: ¿Cómo versionamos los endpoints de la API pública?
memory_en: Public API versioning uses a URL path prefix (/v1, /v2) rather than headers, since it is easier for external partners to discover and pin.

query_es: ¿Cómo hacemos el rollout gradual de una feature flag nueva?
memory_en: New feature flags roll out in stages: internal team first, then 5% of users, then 50%, monitoring error rate at each step before widening.

query_es: ¿Qué política de reintentos usamos para las llamadas al proveedor de pagos?
memory_en: Payment provider calls retry with exponential backoff and jitter, capped at 3 attempts, and treat 5xx responses as retryable but 4xx as terminal.

query_es: ¿Qué métrica dispara la alerta de latencia alta?
memory_en: The high-latency alert fires when p95 request duration exceeds 800ms for 5 consecutive minutes on any of the checkout service pods.

query_es: ¿Por qué usamos builds multi-stage en el Dockerfile?
memory_en: Multi-stage Docker builds keep the final image small by discarding the Go compiler and build cache, shipping only the static binary and CA certs.

query_es: ¿Cómo calculamos los límites de CPU y memoria de los pods?
memory_en: Pod CPU and memory limits are set from the 99th percentile of 7-day usage plus a 30% safety margin, reviewed monthly against actual load.

query_es: ¿Cómo maneja el cliente la reconexión de websockets?
memory_en: The websocket client reconnects with exponential backoff and replays any missed events by requesting a diff since the last acknowledged sequence number.

query_es: ¿Qué algoritmo de rate limiting usamos en el gateway?
memory_en: The API gateway uses a token bucket rate limiter per API key, refilling at a configurable rate, to allow short bursts while capping sustained throughput.

query_es: ¿Dónde vive la configuración de cada entorno?
memory_en: Per-environment configuration lives in YAML files under config/, loaded by environment variable and never committed with real secrets.

query_es: ¿Qué pasos seguimos para actualizar una dependencia con un cambio de versión mayor?
memory_en: Major dependency upgrades go through a spike branch first: upgrade, run the full test suite, read the changelog for breaking changes, then open the real PR.

query_es: ¿Cuál fue la causa de la fuga de memoria en el worker en segundo plano?
memory_en: Root-caused the background worker memory leak to a goroutine that never returned from a channel read because the context was never cancelled on shutdown.

query_es: ¿Cómo resolvimos la condición de carrera en el contador de solicitudes?
memory_en: Fixed the request counter race condition by replacing the unguarded map access with a sync.Mutex around every read and write.

query_es: ¿Por qué cambiamos la paginación por offset a paginación por cursor?
memory_en: Switched list endpoints from offset-based to cursor-based pagination, since offset pagination skipped or duplicated rows under concurrent writes.

query_es: ¿Qué algoritmo de ranking usa la búsqueda de texto completo?
memory_en: Full-text search ranks results with BM25 over the FTS5 index, weighting the title field higher than the body for tie-breaking.

query_es: ¿Cómo evitamos mandar notificaciones duplicadas al usuario?
memory_en: Notification delivery is deduplicated by hashing the event payload and checking a short-lived idempotency key before sending, avoiding duplicate pushes on retry.

query_es: ¿Dónde está el runbook para dar de alta a un desarrollador nuevo?
memory_en: The new-developer onboarding runbook lives in the docs/ folder and covers repo access, local environment setup, and the first-week pairing schedule.

query_es: ¿Cómo decidimos si hacer rollback de un despliegue canary?
memory_en: Canary rollout automatically rolls back if the error rate on the canary pods exceeds twice the baseline for more than 2 minutes.

query_es: ¿Qué modelo de embeddings usamos para la búsqueda semántica?
memory_en: Adopted a local Ollama embeddings model for semantic search over stored memories, keeping vectors in Omnia's own SQLite store separate from the read-only engram database.
